description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized SUV with a streamlined, aerodynamic body finished in white. The vehicle features four passenger doors, tinted windows, and black trim around the windows and lower body. The front grille is wide and flanked by sleek headlights, while the rear includes subtle taillights and a roof-mounted antenna. The wheels are robust, with a multi-spoke design and visible lug nuts, suitable for both urban and light off-road use. The overall design suggests a focus on comfort, safety, and versatility for family or personal transportation.
description: A white, modern SUV with four doors, tinted windows, and multi-spoke wheels, designed for urban and suburban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, sleek headlights, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, tinted windows, and wheel design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillights, rear window, and roof antenna.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing door layout and wheel details.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke steel wheels with circular holes and a simple, utilitarian finish
